archive_data.question_text: Guru Pankaj Charan Das and Guru Debaprasad Das are associated with which of the following dance forms?

explanation.english: Guru Pankaj Charan Das and Guru Debaprasad Das are both renowned exponents and gurus of the Odissi classical dance form.
explanation.tanglish: Guru Pankaj Charan Das matrum Guru Debaprasad Das iruvarum Odissi classical nruthathin perum aasiriargal.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following policies is generally revealed by the annual financial statement of the Government of India?

explanation.english: The annual financial statement (Union Budget) of the Government of India reveals the fiscal policy which deals with government revenue and expenditure.
explanation.tanglish: Bharatha arasudhiyin varusha varavu selavu kadanam (Union Budget) fiskal policy-ai velipadutha padugirathu, idhu arasudhiyin sinthanaigtrum selavugalum sambandhapatathu.

archive_data.question_text: In medieval architecture, Khanqahs are associated with _____.

explanation.english: Khanqahs are hospices or spiritual retreats associated with Sufi saints in medieval Indian architecture.
explanation.tanglish: Madhyakala karuvalarchiyil Khanqah-gal Sufi sannyasigal sambandhithavai, idhu aanmeega thiyana idamaga upayogikkappattathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following committees/commissions was set up in 1976 for recommending for fundamental duties by the Indira Gandhi Government?

explanation.english: The Swaran Singh Committee was appointed in 1976 by the Indira Gandhi Government to recommend the inclusion of Fundamental Duties in the Constitution.
explanation.tanglish: 1976-il Indira Gandhi arasalai Swaran Singh Committee-ai amaithathu, idhu Samvidhanathil moolatharmanimaigalai serkkathakkatha udavi seyyum.

archive_data.question_text: The Narora Atomic Power Station is situated on the banks of the Ganga in _______ state.

explanation.english: Narora Atomic Power Station is located on the banks of River Ganga in Bulandshahr district of Uttar Pradesh.
explanation.tanglish: Narora paramanu vilakkum nilayam Ganga nadhik karaiyil, Uttar Pradesh maanilathin Bulandshahr district-il ullathu.

archive_data.question_text: The rate at which consumers convert the chemical energy in their food into their biomass is called:

explanation.english: Secondary productivity refers to the rate at which consumers (heterotrophs) convert the chemical energy in their food into their own biomass.
explanation.tanglish: Secondary productivity endradhu upborgigal thangal unavilulla rasayanasakthiyai thangal biomass-aga maartrum vidham.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following novels is NOT written by Chetan Bhagat?

options.text: Who Will Cry When You Die?

explanation.english: Who Will Cry When You Die? is written by Robin Sharma, not Chetan Bhagat. The other three novels listed are written by Chetan Bhagat.
explanation.tanglish: 'Who Will Cry When You Die?' Robin Sharma ezhuthiyathu, Chetan Bhagat alladhu. Matra moondru novel-galum Chetan Bhagat ezhuthiyathu.
